THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VESSELS, JEFF S AKA JEFF VESSELS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 954 GEARY STREET #43, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-30-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF TO RETAIN $525 SECURITY DEPOSIT. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. IF DEFT VACATES TIMELY AND MAKES PAYMNT OF MONEY JUDGMNT, PLTF WILL VACATE JUDGMNT & DISMISS W/PREJUDICE.
